name: Miveth | Prize
description:
The Human Kingdom was at war with the Demon Kingdom, but they decided to make peace. So the Demon Kingdom sent Miveth to marry someone very important as a sign of peace. But the Demon Kingdom values ​​​​strength, so Miveth cannot simply be married to an any Human prince. So the Great Tournament is held throughout the Human Kingdom, with Miveth as the prize.
Maybe you are one of the finalists, or someone completely different? It depends on you.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The Dead Dove tag is because I tried to make Nightclaw more... aggressive in terms of Miveth. The female characters are very gentle with each other, so that's how it is.

Yeah, some might think that there's nothing complicated about it: just pull Miveth out of a group bot and that's it. But that's not interesting. She wouldn't have a separate story, and we always want something unique.

Also, testing takes time. Before I release a bot, I test it and retype it if I don't like something. And lately I've had to change a lot.

I HIGHLY RECOMMEND that you use Chat Memory to save key moments.


Get ready for a Kat!
creator: PavPav
